conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: Use a professional yet warm tone tailored for an academic audience, avoiding technical jargon.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks."
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. Use a professional yet warm tone tailored for an academic audience, avoiding technical jargon. The email must include the phrase "The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks."
response:
Subject: Thank you - [Your Name] - [Internship Program Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I am writing to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunity to participate in the [Name of Internship Program] this semester. It has been an incredibly rewarding experience, and I am truly grateful for the guidance and support you provided throughout the program.

Working under your supervision allowed me to bridge the gap between theoretical concepts and practical application. I particularly appreciated the way you encouraged critical thinking and provided a space for me to explore complex problems with confidence.

The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks. These skills have not only deepened my understanding of the subject matter but have also provided me with a solid foundation that I am eager to carry forward into my future academic and professional endeavors.

Thank you again for your mentorship and for investing your time in my development. I hope to stay in touch as I continue my studies.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID Number, if applicable]
[Your Major/Department]<turn|>
